headline: Is Baker Hughes Company (BKR) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is BKR a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Baker Hughes Company on r/AIPortfolios by manojs. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on BKR. Baker Hughes Company’s share was trading at $60.35 as of March 20th. BKR’s trailing and forward P/E were 23.21 and 23.47 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Baker Hughes Company […]

headline: Baker Hughes Develops AI-Enabled Power Optimization and Sustainability Solutions for Data Centers with Google Cloud Technology
